case_title: MAN KIT SOU VS. LANIER PUBLISHING INTERNATIONAL, LTD, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOU, MAN KIT (KEVIN) AS TO DEFENDANT LANIER PUBLISHING INTERNATIONAL, LTD, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA BESCOVER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
